title: Unable to read Outlook attachment as binary
symptom: The workflow fails to read a PDF attachment as binary data, resulting in errors during processing.
applies_when: Attempting to process an email attachment
root_cause: The issue arises when the expected binary data format is not correctly referenced or encoded. The workflow may not be correctly accessing the binary data from the attachment, or the data may not be in the expected format.
fix_steps: Check the output of the 'Download Attachment' node to ensure it contains the binary data.
Update the 'Edit Fields' node to reference the correct path for the binary data, ensuring it points to the actual binary content.
If necessary, use the recommended method from the n8n documentation to convert the binary data to base64.
agent_instruction: Verify the binary data output from the 'Download Attachment' node and adjust the reference in the 'Edit Fields' node accordingly.
